programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Interim Heavyweight World Champion-ship is up for grabs as Tim Johnson collides with Fedor Team protege Valentin Moldavsky. Also Liz 'Girl-Rilla' Carmouche returns to the Bellator MMA cage to battle undefeated Japanese sensation Kana Watanabe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: World Champions collide as Juliana Velasquez looks to make the first defense of her Bellator MMA Women’s Flyweight World Championship when she takes on Bellator Kickboxing Flyweight World Champion Denise 'Miss Dynamite' Kielholtz.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Trigger Warnings do not work, yet trigger warnings, originally used for people suffering from PTSD, are now being used everywhere for everything.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: The latest report by the CDC found 488 people died from alcohol related issues every day during the pandemic, reporting a surge in consumption that hadn’t been seen in 50 years. But many claim the problem is not getting better.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Student athletes say they were hazed, physically & sexually assaulted by their teammates inside the locker rooms. They blame the coaches and the schools for not punishing those responsible and for shaming them. But Dr. Phil blames someone else.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: College campuses, including elite institutions, are seeing protests by pro-Hamas groups and outside agitators. There's a growing hate movement targeting Jews, Israel, and America, challenging our culture and principles.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Is there a wave of migrant crime? High-profile news stories have become lighting rods highlighting the issues with sanctuary cities and policies across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil is joined by NYPD Chief of Patrol John Chell to discuss concerns of rise in migrant crime as recent headlining news has sparked national debate on the safety of our communities across America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil goes inside NYPD headquarters where officers are working around the clock to keep the city safe. Ride a-long with NYPD as they patrol the city's most dangerous streets, showing us first-hand the challenges they're up against.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: When it comes to the future America’s workforce, many business owners claim the country is in serious trouble due to many young adults having a lazy and poor work ethic. But these young adults claim they are not lazy, they are just misunderstood.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Almost 75% of people don't like their neighbors citing some of the following reasons: 'odd vibes', 'too loud', or 'flat-out rude'. Dr. Phil sorts out this unusual feud: Iguanas wreak havoc in Florida and the feud with the neighbor who feeds them!

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil confronts some of America's leading issues from the border crisis to fentanyl to the homelessness epidemic. He hears from Americans grappling with these challenges.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil speaks with parents whose coddling parenting styles some claim are hindering their children’s success in the real world.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: The U.S. has a loneliness epidemic and romance scammers are cashing in. Widow Lucy has sent her online boyfriend Kane $150K to help him get out of prison. When Lucy meets the man in Kane’s photos, what happens?

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr. Phil will speak with teachers who say they were each physically attacked by a high school student. Learn what they claim is behind a surge in student aggression and misconduct towards teachers.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: Dr Phil discusses whether Diversity, Equity and Inclusion initiatives should be improved or removed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Abby announces that she and Carl are planning to elope in Las Vegas, and asks Val to be her maid of honor. Kelly begs Val to let her tag along on the trip because she believes that Brandon is seeing someone else.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Carl decides to annul his marriage to Abby because he believes that he has a future with Valerie. Kelly notices that a store is for lease and decides that she and Donna should open a boutique.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon announces that he has accepted a job with the Washington bureau of the New York Chronicle. Kelly and Donna prepare to open their store, Now Wear This. Valerie seeks legal advice from Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly decides to help Leah and her daughter skip town and assume a new identity. Valerie elects to throw a massive rave as a farewell party before turning herself in to the police.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: As Kelly and Valerie pack Brandon's belongings for shipment, Kelly discovers a letter in which Val advised Brandon not to marry her. She turns everyone against Val and gets them to boycott her Thanksgiving gathering.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: David is arrested for statutory rape and gets suspended from his radio show. Steve bristles at the news that his mother is dating her much younger co-star. Kelly's reaction to Dylan's return worries Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly grows angry with Matt when he takes a case defending a tobacco company. Donna agrees to let a troubled fifteen-year-old girl buy a dress on layaway. Dylan takes his bullet-riddled Porsche out of storage.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan takes Kelly to Mexico for a day and buys her a gift, but Kelly rejects him to focus on her relationship with Matt. Dylan soon takes Gina to Mexico and buys her the same gift.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dissatisfied customers take Steve to court, and wind up on TV; Gina continues to care for Dylan, who is arrested; Donna and Noah struggle to find a place to be alone; David has to back up his lie to Gertrude; Kelly second-guesses herself with Matt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Lauren moves into the Walsh house; Steve's idea for his paper leads to an alert about a potential health problem; Donna agrees to pose as David's girlfriend at a business function; Gina worries she can't keep pace with Dylan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly and Dylan agree to go to Mexico and obtain medication for Lauren. Donna agrees to a date with the persistent David. Gina discovers that her mother spent most of the money she earned skating as a minor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Gina decides to sue Felice for $1.1 million. Donna, torn apart by her family's bickering, runs crying to Noah. Matt learns that Lauren has filed for divorce. Dylan nearly dies in a Jet Ski accident.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Noah faces foreclosure after failing to make his mortgage payments on the Peach Pit/After Dark building. Steve has a man dress up as a leprechaun and promises a "pot of gold" to the person who catches him.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan's friendly gift to Kelly upsets Gina; Steve is unnerved by a psychic's bitter prediction; David and Claudia lay the groundwork for their faux marriage; a high-school nemesis asks for Donna's help; Matt prepares to advertise on TV.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Naomi relays some heartbreaking news; Martin and Smitty deal with an intruder; and Anita is forced to relive painful memories from her past before grappling with information that will affect her future.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva has a stunning revelation to share with Tomas; Anita and Leslie go head to head; and Andre rushes to the hospital after hearing about Derek, and is surprised by Ashley's reaction to seeing him.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Nicole has a major relationship update to tell Kat; Vanessa meets with a new client who has lofty demands; Vernon calls Bill for help, but Bill has some demands that need to be met first; and Dani dishes out some conditions of her own to Andre.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Series Premiere: The holiday season is upon us and in the spirit of scandals, backstabbing, grudges and family drama, CBS brings you the first look at the new scintillating daytime series Beyond the Gates.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees, a powerful and prestigious multi-generational family that is the very definition of Black royalty, live, love, work and play in a leafy Maryland suburb just outside of Washington D.C.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Martin makes a deal with Smitty, Joey ropes Doug into a backroom game, Diego gets territorial over Vanessa, Derek interrupts Andre's moment with Ashley, and Leslie questions Eva's loyalty.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Vernon gets wind of Martin's next move, Ted gets in Leslie's way, Naomi pleads with Dani to be civil, and the family attends Nicole's award ceremony.

programme.title: College Road Trip

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.desc: TV personality Kenya Moore ("The Real Housewives of Atlanta") seeks Patti's help, bringing along fellow cast member Cynthia Bailey for support; singer-songwriter Taylor Dayne is ready to devote some time to finding love.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti helps actress Fran Drescher find a match for her ex-husband, Peter Marc Jacobson; Patti plays matchmaker for TV personality Dina Lohan ("Living Lohan") with the help of their mutual friend, Jill Zarin.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti Stanger and her office staff help successful men find their prospective wives.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti diagnoses Brett, a 28-year-old CEO, with attention-deficit disorder when it comes to dating; David suffers from what Patti calls narcissistic personality disorder.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti hires Destin's girlfriend, Rachel, as an assistant; Patti is excited to learn about a new client named Heidi who happens to be a millionaire; hotel executive Bill is interested in finding love with a younger woman.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.desc: Grammy-nominated jazz musician Jeff joins the Millionaire's Club; Patti diagnoses Jeff with "Divorced-dad-itus"; Harold returns to the Millionaire's Club and Patti gives him a "dating intervention."

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs tiene que dejar a un lado sus sentimientos personales y trabajar con Trent Kort, quien regresa para rastrear a un criminal peligroso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres empleados de restaurantes mueren en un robo/homicidio en Las Vegas, Nevada, la UAC busca pistas en un caso cerrado que sucedió en la ciudad hace seis años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga incidentes de cadáveres que son incorporados en el macabro arte del graffiti en Detroit, sospechan que un escurridizo, pero notorio artista callejero podría ser el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una mujer en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, habitada enteramente por delincuentes sexuales, La UAC se enfrenta a una comunidad repleta de sospechosos. Además, Lewis tiene una oportunidad profesional que puede llevarla lejos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un agente compañero es asesinado, el equipo de NCIS se dirige al desierto para localizar a una mujer que podría tener la respuesta al misterio del asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La muerte de un boxeador lleva a Vance a pedir prestado al equipo de NCIS para comenzar a investigar el caso, mientras Gibbs indaga en el pasado de Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs tiene que dejar a un lado sus sentimientos personales y trabajar con Trent Kort, quien regresa para rastrear a un criminal peligroso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a wild police chase through the streets of a Las Vegas Latino ghetto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Evidence points to Sofia as the shooter who accidentally shot another officer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving night, a man is found dead in a dumpster behind a restaurant.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A widowed mother's six-year-old son is reported kidnapped from a local park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates the murder of a man who was covered in hair from head to toe and shot in the heart with a silver bullet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is brought into the world of tweakers and methamphetamines.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of glamorous old Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates two deaths, both linked to the same killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom teams up with Lady Heather.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is discovered stuffed into a working chimney of a residential home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A crime documentary series follows the CSIs for the first 48 hours of an investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A high profile murder trial is thrown into a tailspin when two siblings confess to the same crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Science collides with the occult when the team investigates the case of a psychic who predicted her own murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of rap music in order to investigate the deaths of three teenagers killed while working for rival rappers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre acusado de asesinar a su esposa y compañeros de trabajo lidera a los CSI en una persecución salvaje a través de un concurrido casino de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se reúne en torno a uno de los suyos, al recibir un disparo en mientras cumplía su trabajo y es posible que no sobreviva en el final de la sexta temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom guía a un grupo de universitarios en un tour por CSI, los muertos hablan mientras los CSI investigan, cada uno narrando su propio caso

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan de primera mano los entresijos del Cirque du Soleil para determinar qué pudo contribuir a la prematura muerte de una joven bailarina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se siente fascinado cuando cada detalle de una miniatura es idéntico al de la escena de un crimen real, y se pone manos a la obra para intentar resolver el caso utilizando las pistas proporcionadas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre inocente es brutalmente atacado y golpeado hasta la muerte por lo que parece un monstruo con una capa negra, los CSI son llamados para investigar, sólo para enterarse de que un ataque similar tuvo lugar minutos después.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer muerta aparece colgada de una cruz en el interior de una iglesia, el equipo sigue las pruebas para descubrir un extraño triángulo amoroso que se remonta a los días de instituto de la víctima.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se denuncia la desaparición de dos niños, el principal sospechoso es un conocido delincuente sexual del barrio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de una anciana, Grissom recibe una réplica en miniatura de la escena del crimen; Greg asiste a una vista para determinar su culpabilidad en la muerte accidental de un adolescente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos gemelas idénticas aparecen muertas, las pruebas en ambos casos no demuestran inmediatamente una conexión entre las dos muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos en Las Vegas que podrían estar relacionados con un infame jefe de la mafia de los años 70 que desapareció hace muchos años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI procesan pistas tras un asesinato en una planta de fabricación de aves de corral, las pruebas les conducen a la casa de un hombre que colecciona trenes en miniatura y otra parafernalia en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El testimonio de Catherine ante el tribunal no es suficiente para condenar a un asesino sospechoso de asesinar a su propia madre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso del sonado asesinato del asambleísta Danilo Zamesca es Thomas Simon, el mayor proveedor de drogas de la costa oeste.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team will stop at nothing to find who shot Horatio, the evidence leads them to some of the most dangerous people in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When gasoline gets so expensive that Miami’s residents kill for it, the CSIs come face to face with one of the city’s most sadistic crime rings.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must find the killer before Delko's darkest secrets are exposed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 200-foot crane crashes into a Miami high rise, putting Calleigh and Delko in jeopardy and killing Horatio’s hope of catching a renowned crime boss.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is found handcuffed and stabbed in his hotel room, while a prank at the lab causes a rift in the CSI team and threatens their investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murderer kidnaps an innocent baby, Horatio and the CSI team must find him before the child becomes his next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran a una profesora de una universidad local colgada de un árbol después de ser torturada. Había sido torturada durante al menos cuatro horas antes de que la ahorcaran.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una niña no identificada cerca de un campo de rehabilitación muy estricto, Horatio y el equipo investigan su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar cuando encuentran a una prostituta muerta a puñaladas metida bajo una cama después de que se limpió el cuerpo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se revela que una red de laboratorios clandestinos está fabricando drogas mortales, Horatio y Speedle investigan la situación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y Speedle investigan cuando un ladrón y violador ha sido agredido sexualmente y atado con cintas a los pilares de su cama después de que lo mataron por asfixia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo se exponen a radiación mientras investigan un asesinato, lo que los lleva a un abogado ambientalista que se muere de envenenamiento por radiación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un ex-convicto que Horatio envió a la cárcel le pide que lo ayude a encontrar a su hijo desaparecido. Él encuentra marihuana mientras busca en la habitación del chico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Estudiantes de todo el país van a Miami para pasar una semana de diversión bajo el sol. La fiesta se interrumpe cuando llaman al equipo de CSI a dos casos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Danny investigate why a young, beautiful, and blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop. Did cuddle parties have anything to do with it?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En una prueba de fe, Mac Taylor asigna a los detectives Danny Messer y Aiden Burn a uno de los casos más difíciles del equipo de CSI hasta ahora.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un robo en Chinatown sale mal cuando asesinan a un guardia de seguridad y el otro dispara por error a un tanque de gasolina y dos de los ladrones se queman vivos.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Slept With 10 Men…I'm Not The Dad!
programme.desc: Zebarious and his new girlfriend want a DNA test to prove he didn’t father Rhonda’s child. But Rhonda doesn’t think so! Later, Mary says her son’s fiancée is a cheater because she hit on her!

programme.desc: If Mayyadah’s husband’s lie detector test proves that he’s having sex through online chat rooms, then they’re getting a divorce! Will Debbie kick fiancée Pablo out over cheating suspicions?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charisma thinks her fiancé Trey is cheating with her cousin! Then, is Dustin is cheating and being helped by his father? Later, Greg has a thing for big women. His wife Jessica wants to know if it's just a phase or if she's been betrayed by his family!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 35-year old Lil Tia thinks her 24-year old boyfriend Antonio is cheating with her teen niece and daughter! Plus, Kim suspects her boyfriend Marcell of cheating and Laura thinks her boyfriend Tim is his cab for more than rides.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Devin cheating on Shantia with other women including her own sister? He swears he's not a cheater, but our lie detector test will get down to the truth! Plus more shocking cheating mysteries solved!

programme.desc: Ebony swears that Andre fathered her special needs daughter, but he denies it! Then, Jodi completely denies that he’s the father of Ashawnda’s baby! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jennifer needed a ride, but found love instead. But is her man Clarence using his taxi for picking up other women? Then, Lisa and her son Shawn think that David is cheating on her and want him out of their lives?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Michael says that he and Britny didn’t make love for nearly long enough for her to get pregnant. Shekeita and her sister Natasha are here to prove that Kieary is the real father of Shekeita’s baby.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These women, once and for all, want to prove to their men they ARE the father of their baby and they need to be responsible for their child. Plus, did man really father a child with his neighbor behind his partner's back?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Alexis and Rachean met while working at a fast-food restaurant. Is Alexis now pregnant with Rachaen's child? Then, Fred cheated on Amanda with her ex-lesbian lover Ashlynn! Now both women are saying that Fred is the father!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Elizabeth swears that a psychic told her and her whole family that her son Nehemiah didn't father Ja'Quasia's baby. But Ja'Quasia doesn't believe in a crystal ball. Then, Heidi and Tabbi claim AJ fathered their kids, but AJ only believes Tabbi!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Things were once great for today's guests, but after these women revealed they were pregnant, the relationships were no longer so rosy. These women want to prove to their men they ARE the father and need to be responsible for their children.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Gerica met Skyler a year after Hurricane Katrina and is 100% sure that Skyler has to be the father of her son. Then, Sarah made the mistake of sleeping with 2 men years ago and thinks Johnny fathered her son! Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesino probablemente esperaba cubrir sus huellas escenificando la escena del crimen. Pero los investigadores descubrieron el intento casi de inmediato y recurrieron a la ciencia forense para saber qué sucedió esa noche realmente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween de 2004, Adriane Insogna y Leslie Mazzara fueron brutalmente asesinadas en su casa de Napa, California.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: Natural World

programme.title: The X-Creatures

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years, but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: Iron Monkey (1993)
programme.desc: Presented by Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey is the spirited tale of a mysterious and mythical Chinese legend in this exhilarating non-stop martial arts excitement.

programme.title: Hero (Ying xiong)
programme.desc: Acclaimed by critics and loved by audiences around the world, Jet Li, Maggie Cheung, and Donnie Yen star in this Oscar and Golden Globe-nominated action-packed epic, in which a fearless warrior rises up to defy an empire and unite a nation.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
